news.headline: Spalding and Harlem Globetrotters collaborate on first-ever consumer game ball release, limited edition in history.
news.summary: A renowned basketball equipment company and a globally celebrated basketball team have collaborated to launch a unique, commemorative game ball for the first time ever. This special edition, named Spalding x Harlem Globetrotters, will be available to fans from June 27, 2024 onwards. The limited-release of this distinctive basketball signifies a historic moment, showcasing the partnership between Spalding and the Harlem Globetrotters. The joint effort aims to provide fans with an exclusive product that blends the quality associated with Spalding equipment and the iconic status of the Harlem Globetrotters. This collaboration is set to excite basketball enthusiasts, with the limited-edition game ball likely to be highly sought-after.

news.headline: Harvest Yard, Somm. Hotel, and River Run Townhomes to complete in mid-2025 in Woodinville, WA. Tower cranes present for ongoing transformation.
news.summary: In mid-2025, three major construction projects in the Hollywood District of Woodinville, Washington will be completed. These projects include Harvest Yard, the Somm. Hotel, and River Run Townhomes. The development process can be observed with tower cranes in action, signaling significant progress in the area. This transformation in the Hollywood District is set to reshape the landscape, offering new opportunities and amenities for residents and visitors alike.

news.headline: SAMBAZON releases 3rd Impact Report on economic, social, environmental standards. From San Clemente, CA. June 27, 2024.
news.summary: SAMBAZON, a company based in San Clemente, California, emphasized their commitment to measuring economic impact, social standards for stakeholder well-being, and environmental standards for planet protection. On June 27, 2024, SAMBAZON, which stands for Sustainable Management of the Brazilian Amazon, highlighted these values. They are known as the top supplier in their industry.

news.headline: High Wire Networks sold its technology services business assets in an all-cash deal to focus on its AI-powered managed cybersecurity services. This move aims to boost growth and development of its Overwatch Managed Cybersecurity Business and recurring revenue streams.
news.summary: Proceeds from the sale will be used to enhance the growth and advancement of the company's acclaimed Overwatch Managed Cybersecurity Business and its higher-margin recurring revenue streams.

news.headline: Perpetua Resources Corp. (Nasdaq: PPTA) released its 2023 Sustainability Report showcasing advancements in sustainability.
news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, on June 27, 2024, Perpetua Resources Corp. (Nasdaq: PPTA) (TSX: PPTA) unveiled its 2023 Sustainability Report. The report, which focuses on Perpetua Resources' efforts in environmental and social advancement, showcases significant milestones. The Company's commitment to sustainability and progress is evident in the comprehensive report, which outlines key accomplishments and initiatives.

news.headline: GT Biopharma's IND application for GTB-3650, a NK cell engager for CD33+ Leukemia, cleared by FDA for Phase 1 trial in 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, California, on June 27, 2024, GT Biopharma, Inc. disclosed that the FDA has approved its Investigational New Drug (IND) application for GTB-3650. This milestone permits the company to initiate a Phase 1 clinical trial expected to commence in the latter half of 2024. GT Biopharma, a clinical stage immuno-oncology entity specializing in pioneering therapeutics leveraging its exclusive TriKE® platform centered on natural killer (NK) cell engager technology, is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol GTBP.

news.headline: Terranet extends loan by SEK 8 million, now totaling SEK 8 million, with maturity date of June 30, 2025.
news.summary: Today, Terranet has reached an agreement with its current lenders to extend a portion of the current loan, amounting to SEK 8 million. This extension will last for an additional twelve months, with the loan now set to mature on June 30, 2025.

news.headline: Music Licensing, Inc. received third royalty payments from iconic artists like Elton John, Miley Cyrus, and Lil Wayne.
news.summary: In Naples, FL, on June 27, 2024, Music Licensing, Inc. (OTC: SONG) has received its third royalty payments successfully. These payments stem from owning the rights to a group of musical works by illustrious artists like Elton John, Miley Cyrus, Lil Wayne, Lil Nas X, XXXTENTACION, and Halsey. The company's strategic ownership of these artists' intellectual properties has proven lucrative, reflecting its commitment to managing and profiting from these renowned musicians' works.

news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. appoints Brett Fenn as Managing Director, Head of Business Banking.
news.summary: In Dallas on June 27, 2024, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) revealed the appointment of Brett Fenn as Managing Director, Head of Business Banking for Texas Capital. Fenn's new role is effective immediately.

news.headline: Wrike wins "Best AI-Based Solution for Manufacturing" in the AI Breakthrough Awards program by Tech Breakthrough.
news.summary: Wrike, a work management platform based in San Diego, was recently awarded the title of “Best AI-based Solution for Manufacturing” in the prestigious seventh annual AI Breakthrough Awards by Tech Breakthrough. This recognition highlights Wrike's technological innovation in leveraging artificial intelligence within manufacturing processes. The award signifies Wrike’s substantial influence on project management procedures, showcasing its effectiveness in streamlining operations. This accolade underscores Wrike's commitment to excellence and advancement in the global AI market.

news.headline: JD Rogers promoted to Vice President & Chief Information Security Officer at American Financial Group, Inc. (AFG), joining in 2008.
news.summary: American Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: AFG) based in Cincinnati has promoted JD Rogers to the position of Vice President & Chief Information Security Officer. Rogers, who has been with the company since 2008, led the Enterprise Information Security Group (EISG) from 2013. Previously, he was the Divisional Senior Vice President of AFG's property and casualty insurance operations, Great American Insurance Group. The promotion signifies his expertise and contributions to the company's cybersecurity strategies.

news.headline: GuidePoint Security partners with Quokka in Federal Emerging Cyber Vendor Program in Herndon, VA. #cybersecurity
news.summary: Quokka has recently become a part of GuidePoint Security's Emerging Cyber Vendor Program, based in Herndon, Virginia. This marks an important development in the cybersecurity industry, as Quokka joins a select group of innovative companies working with GuidePoint Security. This partnership aims to enhance cybersecurity solutions and services, benefiting clients with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Core4ce in Arlington, VA appoints Todd Harbour as CTO and launches innovation incubator "The Forge", with Kim Kok as VP and Michael Sass as Head of Data Engineering.
news.summary: Core4ce, a federal contractor specializing in data and cyber operations, based in Arlington, VA, has revealed three leadership changes. Todd Harbour, co-founder and managing partner, has been appointed Chief Technology Officer to lead The Forge, the company's innovation incubator. Joining Harbour are Kim Kok, the new Vice President of Sales and Emerging Technology, and Michael Sass, the Head of Data Engineering and Analytics. This move marks an expansion in Core4ce's leadership team as they focus on enhancing their technological capabilities.

news.headline: Alliance Trust PLC reports Net Asset Value at £800 million, showing a 10% increase from last quarter.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to expand by 6% in 2021, the fastest growth rate since 1973. This growth is primarily attributed to the widespread vaccination campaigns and unprecedented government stimulus measures. The report also highlights that the world GDP is anticipated to reach $88 trillion this year. However, the recovery is expected to be uneven across countries, with advanced economies likely to lead the way. Developing economies are anticipated to face challenges due to slower vaccination progress and limited fiscal support. Inflation rates are also projected to rise, particularly in the United States and parts of Europe. Additionally, the report suggests that global trade is set to increase by 8%, driven by the robust recovery in both goods and services sectors. Despite these positive projections, uncertainties remain, such as the emergence of new variants of the virus and potential delays in vaccine distribution. Overall, the outlook is cautiously optimistic, with hopes for a sustained and inclusive recovery in the coming months.

news.headline: Elton John teams up with eBay to sell his pre-loved fashion collection for Elton John AIDS Foundation. Hundreds of items available globally.
news.summary: "Rocket Man Resale" is showcasing a vast collection of clothing, shoes, and accessories from Elton John and associates on eBay for global shoppers. On June 27, 2024, the initiative was announced to coincide with Pride Month, where Elton John's iconic wardrobe is up for sale on eBay in support of the Elton John AIDS Foundation. This effort includes hundreds of pieces available for purchase, offering a unique opportunity for fans and fashion enthusiasts to own a piece of music and pop culture history.

news.headline: Automation Anywhere named to 2024 Top Most Loved Workplaces® for LGBTQ+ employees, ranking high for LGBTQ+ employee support.
news.summary: Automation Anywhere, a leading company in AI-powered automation solutions, has been recognized for its dedication to supporting and empowering LGBTQ+ employees. Based in San Jose, Calif., the company made its first appearance on the Top Most Loved Workplace® List. This achievement reflects the company's commitment to fostering an inclusive work environment. The news was released on June 27, 2024, by PR Newswire.

news.headline: Converge Technology Solutions named North America Storage Partner of the Year by Hewlett Packard Enterprise. TSX: CTS.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, Toronto and Gatineau, QC witnessed Converge Technology Solutions Corp. ("Converge" or "the Company") (TSX: CTS) receiving the prestigious North America Storage Partner of the Year award from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) at the recent HPE Discover event. This recognition highlights Converge's exceptional performance in the industry.

news.headline: Malaysia Blockchain Week (MYBW) to debut in July 2024, marking the country's foray into Web3. Event in Kuala Lumpur with Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Malaysia announced its entrance into the Web3 blockchain sector through the launch of Malaysia Blockchain Week (MYBW) in collaboration with the Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation (MDEC). The event marks the country's official foray into the industry with Minister of Digital, YB Tuan Gobind Singh leading the initiative. This move reflects Malaysia's commitment to embracing blockchain technology in the digital economy.

news.headline: Baseten launches Chains, a framework for Compound AI Systems, built on the Truss framework.
news.summary: Earlier on June 27, 2024, in San Francisco, a notable company known for high-performance AI inference, Baseten, unveiled the beta version of Chains. This software, developed from Baseten's Truss framework, aims to optimize the efficiency of products that rely on multiple AI models. This release marks a significant advancement in improving product performance and highlights Baseten's commitment to innovation in the AI industry.

news.headline: Illumex secures $13M funding for GenAI, creating cohesive data environment for AI. Enhanced reliability and transparency.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024 in New York, illumex, a Generative Semantic Fabric platform for structured enterprise, was introduced. This platform serves as an intermediary layer that addresses data silos by providing context and enhancing data with meaning. This functionality enables the facilitation of trustworthy and transparent AI projects.

news.headline: Mytheresa & Flamingo Estate team up for 'The Railroad Racetrack' in East Hampton, a luxury shopping experience.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, Mytheresa and Flamingo Estate are continuing their collaboration by launching a seasonal pop-up in East Hampton, NY. Following their successful partnership in 2023, the experiential destination will feature the Railroad Racetrack, offering a variety of attractions and experiences. This initiative aims to attract visitors and guests to enjoy the unique offerings provided by the partnership.

news.headline: I'm Lonely, Inc. introduces new dating app promoting genuine connections in local community. Launch date June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, I'm Lonely, Inc. unveiled a groundbreaking dating app aimed at facilitating real-life connections among users with common interests in the Houston area. This innovative platform is accessible on Android devices and strives to bring together individuals seeking meaningful relationships within their local community.

news.headline: SmartPath named leader in company culture on Inc.'s Best Workplaces list for 2024, excelling in creating exceptional workplaces.
news.summary: In Atlanta on June 27, 2024, SmartPath was recognized by Inc. for making it to the annual Best Workplaces list. This list, showcased on Inc.com, highlights American companies that have stood out in fostering outstanding workplaces and corporate cultures. The recognition reflects SmartPath's commitment to creating a positive work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders approves resolutions at Rokiskio suris AB on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: During the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders held on June 27, 2024, Rokiskio suris AB approved several resolutions. The Company stakeholders gave their consent to the following decisions: increasing the annual dividend payout to €2.50 per share, approving the budget for the construction of a new production facility totaling €10 million, and electing a new Board of Directors comprising seven members. These resolutions signify the Company's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and expanding its operational capacity.

news.headline: TPG invests in Altimetrik to aid growth and innovation. TPG Asia will make majority investment; expanding reach of Altimetrik.
news.summary: Altimetrik, a digital business company, has confirmed a major investment deal with TPG, a global alternative asset firm. This agreement involves TPG obtaining a majority stake in Altimetrik, showcasing the company's unique digital business model and impressive growth. The investment is facilitated through TPG's Asia private equity platform, aiming to bolster Altimetrik's brand and services. This alliance signifies a significant milestone for Altimetrik, demonstrating its market appeal and potential expansion under TPG's support.

news.headline: Busuu introduces AI 'Speaking Practice' to enhance conversation skills, boasting 120M users.
news.summary: A language learning provider, Busuu, operating as a Chegg service, has launched a new 'speaking practice' feature, utilizing AI technology to assist learners in practicing speaking a foreign language independently. With a vast user base of over 120 million registered users, the feature offers a secure and non-judgmental space for learners. It provides AI-generated feedback, personalized pronunciation exercises, and video content featuring native speakers, enhancing listening and pronunciation abilities. This innovative tool aims to boost learners' confidence in language skills.

news.headline: Savvy Advisors adds four new wealth managers in recruiting push.
news.summary: Four additional wealth managers have recently joined Savvy Advisors based in New York. This latest development was disclosed by the firm via a press release.

news.headline: Infinant Health promotes gut health with discounted Evivo Probiotic for infants, focused on changing health trajectory.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Davis, California, Infinant Health, a privately-owned company with a mission to revolutionize human health starting with infants, is emphasizing the significance of gut health in babies. Their primary offering, Evivo™ infant probiotic, aims to raise awareness about this crucial aspect of infant health.

news.headline: Hudson Pacific Properties (NYSE: HPP) to release Q2 results on August 7, 2024 after market close. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc. (NYSE: HPP), a leading provider of real estate solutions for tech and media tenants, is set to unveil its second-quarter financial results on August 7, 2024, after the markets close. The company has scheduled a conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET for result discussions. For those interested in joining via phone, dial (833) 470-1428 and use passcode 550142. International participants can call (40...).

news.headline: Clearstory secures $16M Series B funding to grow its change order platform for construction industry, raising total capital to $35M. Led by Prudence.
news.summary: In Walnut Creek, California, Clearstory, a platform for communication regarding change orders in the construction industry, has reported the completion of a Series B financing round worth $16 million. This latest funding has pushed the total capital raised by the company to $35 million. The investment was spearheaded by Prudence, a venture firm focusing on technology companies at the forefront of reshaping the built environment globally. Additionally, Industry Ventures and previous investors also took part in this round.

news.headline: Survey by ARC shows 80% of Americans view manufacturing as vital to economy, 1,000 adults participated in the study.
news.summary: According to a survey by ARC (American Revitalization Company), 80% of Americans view manufacturing as crucial to the U.S. economy. The study, involving 1,000 U.S. adults, highlights a widespread belief in the importance of manufacturing within the country. This sentiment reflects a national preference for keeping manufacturing jobs within the U.S. and boosting domestic production.

news.headline: Austin Rabine is returning as CEO of SITE Technologies for growth; company had record sales year.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from SITE Technologies, a leading company in Asset Management and Data Analytics based in Chicago, it was revealed that Austin Rabine, the Co-founder and former CEO, will be rejoining the company to spearhead its direction in the upcoming phase of product development and substantial expansion. The decision comes on the heels of remarkable sales performance, marking a record-breaking year for the organization. Having previously served as the startup CEO during the formative stages of SITE, Rabine's reappointment signifies a strategic move fueled by his wealth of experience and strong commitment to leveraging innovative technologies to drive growth.

news.headline: Balfour Beatty earns LEED Gold certification for The Broadview at Vanderbilt student housing project, showcasing commitment to sustainability and energy efficiency.
news.summary: In MALVERN, Pennsylvania, Balfour Beatty Campus Solutions, a prominent developer and operator of college and university infrastructure projects, celebrates The Broadview at Vanderbilt receiving the esteemed LEED Gold Certification from the United States Green Building Council (USGBC). This recognition underscores Balfour Beatty Campus Solutions' dedication to sustainable development, energy efficiency, and environmental efforts. The project's highest rating acknowledges its adherence to green building standards and practices, further solidifying the company's commitment to eco-friendly initiatives.

news.headline: Populous chosen to design MLS NEXT Pro Stadium in Albany by Business for Good Co-Founders and investors.
news.summary: In Albany, New York on June 27, 2024, the Co-Founders of Business for Good, Ed and Lisa Mitzen, along with investors such as real estate developers Jeff Buell and Chris Spraragen, and professional soccer coach Steve Freeman, have revealed the hiring of Populous for their latest project.

news.headline: Jones Soda releases HD-9 Shooters, meeting demand for mini drinks, expands into new beverage format. #JonesSoda #JSDA #PRNewswire
news.summary: Jones Soda has introduced a new brand, Crossover HD-9, to cater to the rising demand for mini drinks. The company, famous for its exceptional taste and unique flavors, aims to expand its presence in this emerging category. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, in Seattle. Jones Soda Co. is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange as JSDA and on the OTCQB market also as JSDA. This strategic move showcases the company's commitment to meeting consumer needs while capitalizing on market trends, marking a new chapter in its brand evolution.

news.headline: 73% of health care workers surveyed see disparities in care for BIPOC patients, per National Medical Fellowships study.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Alexandra, Virginia, a recent survey conducted by National Medical Fellowships (NMF) revealed that approximately 75% of healthcare workers observed discrepancies in the treatment provided to patients of color. This exploratory research sheds light on the pervasive issue of inequality within the healthcare system.

news.headline: NTSB upset with Boeing for revealing details on 737 Max probe; mishandled info on Alaska Airlines panel blowout.
news.summary: According to a report by the National Transportation Safety Board, Boeing allegedly disclosed incorrect details concerning the rupture of a panel during an Alaska Airlines flight.

news.headline: Mavenir, VIAVI, and CableLabs complete 3GPP Security Assurance Testing for RU, DU, and CU in 2024 O-RAN PlugFest.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, Mavenir has announced the successful completion of 3GPP Security Assurance Testing for the Radio Unit (RU), Distributed Unit (DU), and Centralized Unit (CU) in collaboration with VIAVI and CableLabs. This achievement showcases Mavenir's commitment to ensuring the security of their equipment in compliance with industry standards.

news.headline: Render Networks partners with Safe Software to enhance construction management with advanced data integration, leveraging FME processes.
news.summary: Render Networks has recently entered into a service partnership with Safe Software in Denver. With this collaboration, Render aims to enhance its digital construction management platform by incorporating advanced data integration and transformation capabilities provided by Safe Software's Feature Manipulation Engine (FME) processes. By leveraging this partnership, Render will be able to offer its customers enhanced solutions, resulting in more efficient project deliveries. This collaboration signifies Render's commitment to providing cutting-edge services in construction management.

news.headline: Mythic appoints Dr. Taner Ozcelik as CEO to expand AI inference market, leveraging analog compute-in-memory technology for energy efficiency and cost savings.
news.summary: In Austin today, semiconductor company Mythic announced Dr. Taner Ozcelik, former NVIDIA automotive division founder and VP & GM, as its new CEO. Ozcelik will spearhead Mythic's advancement in AI processing with its analog compute-in-memory technology, aiming to tap into untapped AI inference markets. Currently, AI inference is limited to expensive applications due to digital computing's memory and energy constraints. Mythic is poised to disrupt this space with its innovative product.

news.headline: Chad Bennett joins Teradata as SVP in Investor Relations and Corporate Development, was with Craig-Hallum Capital.
news.summary: In San Diego, a recent news release stated that Bennett, previously employed by Craig-Hallum Capital as a Senior Vice President/Partner in Equity Research, has joined a new company. He brings a wealth of experience from his previous role and is expected to contribute significantly to the new organization.

news.headline: "Luigi’s Mansion 2 HD out now for Nintendo Switch, help Luigi with Poltergust 5000 to restore Dark Moon."
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, this week's Nintendo Download features new content available on the Nintendo eShop for the Nintendo Switch. Gamers can now enjoy Luigi’s Mansion 2 HD, where they help Luigi tame unruly ghosts and restore the Dark Moon. This game allows players to explore various haunted mansions and utilize the Poltergust 5000 to capture ghosts and explore every corner of these spooky yet endearing locations. This addition aims to provide an engaging experience for players on the go.

news.headline: Relm Insurance partners with SideChannel for cybersecurity; enhances protection for clients in innovative industries.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on June 27, 2024, a notable collaboration was announced between Relm Insurance, a top specialty insurance carrier for innovative industries, and SideChannel, a leading cybersecurity services and technology provider. The partnership aims to enhance support for emerging sectors.

news.headline: Box Inc. enhances Box AI for Intelligent Content Management with unlimited end user queries for Enterprise Plus customers. New features include integration with GPT-4o, support for image and spreadsheet files, and Box AI for Metadata API.
news.summary: In California, Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) revealed that on its Enterprise Plus plan, customers will now have unrestricted end user queries in Box AI for Hubs, Documents, and Notes. Additionally, Box introduced fresh features in Box AI, such as integration with GPT-4o, backing for image and spreadsheet files, and the Box AI for Metadata API. The company emphasizes that artificial intelligence signifies a critical transformation in how businesses interact with their content, empowering organizations to leverage the potential of AI to enhance their operations significantly.

news.headline: Men's Wearhouse offers 25% discount to military personnel, families at all stores from June 29 to July 6. HOUSTON, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In honor of military personnel, Veterans, and their families, Tailored Brands will be hosting its inaugural Military Appreciation Week from June 29 to July 6. This event offers a substantial 25% discount at all Men's Wearhouse, Jos. A. Bank, and Moores store locations. To avail of this special discount, individuals must present a valid military ID for verification. This initiative by Tailored Brands aims to show gratitude and support for those who have served in the armed forces. The promotion is scheduled to take place nationwide and seeks to benefit a significant number of military-affiliated individuals.

news.headline: Central Maine Community College partners with FBA to train fiber technicians through OpTIC Path program to connect communities.
news.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) has revealed that the Optical Telecom Installer Certification (OpTIC Path™) program is now open to residents in Maine via Central Maine Community College (CMCC). This course aims to equip individuals with the necessary skills to become proficient fiber technicians, essential for growing local networks and providing high-speed fiber broadband services to communities in Maine. Graduates of the OpTIC Path program will also benefit from promising prospects in the field, facilitating their entry into this growing industry.

news.headline: Crocs, Inc. releases 2023 Comfort Report, detailing efforts for a more comfortable world, with focus on bio-circular materials and end-of-life solutions. BROOMFIELD, Colo., June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the advancements made by Crocs, Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX) in their journey towards achieving key milestones. The company, based in Broomfield, Colorado, has made significant progress in the innovation of bio-circular materials and end-of-life solutions as part of their ambitious initiatives. These developments signify the company's commitment to sustainability and corporate responsibility. The report indicates substantial growth and showcases the dedication of Crocs, Inc. in driving forward their innovative practices.

news.headline: Zilliant hires 3 new executives to enhance pricing expertise, focusing on CPQ processes for manufacturing and distribution.
news.summary: Today, in Austin, Texas, Zilliant, a prominent figure in pricing lifecycle management for businesses, disclosed the addition of three key executives to its leadership team. Russ Halvorson has been appointed as the global head of sales engineering, Bob Pedersen will serve as the head of North America sales, and Matt Hobbs will take on the role of strategic account executive. These strategic hires were made to enhance Zilliant's expertise in configure, price, and quote (CPQ) processes, catering specifically to the needs of the manufacturing and distribution industries. This move follows Zilliant's recent momentum, solidifying its position as an industry leader.

news.headline: Zimperium appoints Michael Williams as new CMO with over 2 decades in cybersecurity marketing.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Zimperium, a prominent figure in mobile security, proudly revealed the selection of Michael Williams as the company's latest Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). Possessing a remarkable track record of more than twenty years in cybersecurity marketing, Michael is set to bring his expertise to this role.

news.headline: Payroll Integrations report shows 72% of workers disagree with employers' efforts on financial wellness.
news.summary: A technology company in San Diego, Payroll Integrations, has recently unveiled the initial segment of its 2024 State of Employee Financial Wellness Report. The report sheds light on a discrepancy between employers' perception of their role in supporting employees' financial well-being and how supported employees actually feel. Surprisingly, only 49% of employers think they are fully supporting their employees in this aspect. This report is the first in a two-part series focusing on benefit automation and reimagining ways to enhance employees' financial wellness.
